cenas.dalle_prompt: A person stands in a doorway of a different room, calling a puppy with a happy and inviting tone, the puppy in the foreground looks up, ears perked, cinematic quality, 8k detail
cenas.grok_movement: Rack focus from the puppy in the foreground to the person in the background, emphasizing the distance

cenas.dalle_prompt: The puppy runs excitedly through the house, navigating around furniture, to get to the person, a fun and dynamic shot, cinematic quality, 8k detail
cenas.grok_movement: Low-angle tracking shot from the puppy's perspective, making the run feel fast and exciting

cenas.dalle_prompt: Split screen showing two people taking turns calling the dog back and forth in a hallway, like a game, the dog running happily between them, cinematic quality, 8k detail
cenas.grok_movement: The camera stays in the middle of the hallway, panning left and right to follow the dog as it runs between the two people

cenas.dalle_prompt: A map of a house is shown with animated arrows illustrating different paths the dog can be called from (e.g., from the kitchen to the living room, from the bedroom to the office), educational infographic, 8k detail
cenas.grok_movement: The animated arrows draw themselves on the map, illustrating the different practice scenarios

cenas.dalle_prompt: Final shot of the puppy sleeping soundly at the person's feet, tired but happy after a fun training session, text overlay 'Prática Divertida, Resultados Reais', heartwarming and professional, 8k quality
cenas.grok_movement: Slow zoom out from the sleeping puppy to show the peaceful scene, text fades in gently
